name: Blog Writing
description: Drafts long-form blog posts for the Cycles of Learning platform on education and instructional practice.

inputs.name: topic
inputs.description: The subject or thesis of the blog post.

inputs.name: keyPoints
inputs.description: Main arguments, ideas, or points to cover.

inputs.name: references
inputs.description: Any research, quotes, or sources to incorporate.

outputs.name: blogDraft
outputs.description: Complete blog post draft with title, body, and conclusion.
